appraisal_events.evidence: Robert de Saint-Loup ignorait presque toutes les infidélités de sa maîtresse… Il y avait à Paris deux honnêtes gens que Robert de Saint-Loup ne saluait plus… c'est qu'ils avaient été ruinés par Rachel.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Robert as naïve and blinded by love, ignorant of his mistress’s infidelities and misjudging others, which locally lowers his appraisal.

status_effects.explanation: He appears credulous and misled, cutting off honest men and misunderstanding his mistress, which diminishes his local standing in the narrator’s account.
